title: avenula pratensis var. gonzaloi
intro: Avenula pratensis var. gonzaloi, also known as Gonzalo's meadow-grass, is a plant species belonging to the grass family (Poaceae) and is a variant of the common meadow-grass (Avenula pratensis). The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Avenula pratensis var. gonzaloi include its potential anti-inflammatory and antifungal effects, which may be beneficial for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, although further research is required to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
